payment.shipping_required: Please fill in the shipping address
payment.confirm_failed: Failed to create order, please try again later
payment.intent_create_failed: Unable to create payment, please try again later
payment.wallet_checkout_requires_wallet: For full wallet checkout, please check "Use Wallet Balance".
payment.wallet_insufficient_for_total: The wallet balance is insufficient to cover the entire order amount.
payment.wallet_checkout_not_zero: This order still needs to be paid online, please use credit card or PayPal.
payment.payable_zero_use_wallet_button: The amount payable is 0, please click "Confirm Order" directly to pay in full with your wallet, no need to swipe your card or PayPal.
payment.lalamove_not_configured: Lalamove instant delivery is not set up (requires API key and pickup coordinates).
payment.lalamove_address_too_short: The shipping address is too short, please fill in the complete address for shipping estimate.
payment.lalamove_geocode_failed: Unable to convert the address into coordinates, please check whether the address is correct.
payment.lalamove_quote_failed: Unable to get Lalamove shipping quote, please try again later.
payment.lalamove_session_stale: Shipping information has expired, please refresh the checkout page before paying.
payment.lalamove_checkout_outdated: The contents of the shopping cart have been changed. Please refresh the checkout page before obtaining a quote and making payment.
payment.lalamove_method_requires_address: Please select or fill in the complete delivery address when selecting Lalamove.
